title: Visible Offhand Restock
description: Show both hands at the same time! Port for Minecraft version 26.1.2
body:
# Visible Offhand
Rendering both hands simultaneously in a first-person perspective is a fun experience!

![Settings menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19290766759ac21e9addd0dfea728819e37809cd.png)

## Disclamer
This mod is a complete port of the original mod for the newest version of Minecraft. You can find the original mod [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/visible-offhand).
